economic_notes: Consolidated entities include solar LPs (NFN Solar LP, Nipissing Solar SPN LP), forestry (N'Bisiing Forestry Inc.), community development (Nipissing Community Developments LP), Bineshii Projects LP (business park), and 1073059 Ontario Inc. Nipissing 2013 Boundary Claim Trust holds ~$99M in investments. Partnership with Miller Paving Limited. Robinson Huron Treaty Trust beneficiary.
notes: No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text. The Nipissing 2013 Boundary Claim Trust (~$99M in restricted investments) is fully consolidated and is a major driver of accumulated surplus and remeasurement gains ($12.5M unrealized gains in 2024 vs $13.6M losses in 2023). Prior year ISC per funding confirmation was $23.6M but ISC revenue recognized was $19.7M due to deferred revenue movements. Total government transfers calculated as: ISC $20,345,160 + MCSS $2,046,707 + Ministry of Education $693,375 + Other Provincial $4,574,733 + Kinoomaadziwin Education Body $10,330,069 + Union of Ontario Indians ($-77,661) + CMHC $5,448,484 + Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership $1,803,005 = $45,163,872; OSR = $62,503,095 - $44,941,095 = $17,562,000 (approx, excluding UOI negative). 11 consolidated subsidiaries including GPs and LPs. Prior year comparative surplus of $2,485,061 is per statement of operations; prior accumulated surplus opening was $172,266,891. Segmented expenses show 'Other' category includes $5,870,321. Interest expense in segmented info shows $194,001 vs $200,007 in note 11 (minor rounding difference).
